message.content:
To recreate this landing page **exactly**, follow this comprehensive breakdown of every element, including layout, colors, text, and responsive details:


### **1. Exact Layout Structure (Top to Bottom)**
The page uses a **vertical, single-column layout** with distinct sections, each separated by subtle spacing. The structure is:  
1. **Header**: Logo + Brand Name  
2. **Hero Section**: Profile Photo + Tagline + Subheadline  
3. **Service Cards Section**: 3 Feature Cards (Team, Productivity, Consultation)  
4. **Social Media & Contact Section**: Icons + Email  
5. **Opt-in Form Section**: Newsletter Signup  
6. **Closing Section**: Motivational Quote  


### **2. Colors Used**
- **Background**: Solid black (`#000000`)  
- **Text**:  
  - Primary: White (`#FFFFFF`)  
  - Accent: Bright orange (`#FFA500` or similar warm orange)  
- **Buttons**:  
  - Primary: Orange (`#FFA500`) with white text  
  - Secondary: White outline (for icons)  
- **Borders/Accents**: Thin orange lines (`#FFA500`) for section dividers and card outlines  


### **3. All Text Content (Exact Phrasing)**
- **Header**:  
  - Logo: "JC" (stylized, see Font Styles)  
  - Brand Name: "JUST CHURCHY" (uppercase, spaced)  
- **Hero Section**:  
  - Tagline: "Faith. Wellness. Purpose. Freedom." (periods after each word)  
  - Subheadline: "Resources and tools to help you heal, grow, build, and live **on purpose**." (italicized "on purpose")  
- **Service Cards**:  
  - Card 1: "Build Your Team Advantage" → "Find the right people. Delegate with clarity. Build a team that helps you scale."  
  - Card 2: "Productivity Stack (Free)" → "Get my favorite tools, systems, and AI workflows to save time and get more done."  
  - Card 3: "Consultation" → "Need strategy? Let’s build your team, establish your systems, and create a plan that moves your vision forward."  
- **Social Media Section**:  
  - Email: "support@justchurchy.com"  
- **Opt-in Form**:  
  - Headline: "Stay inspired. Grow in **purpose**." (italicized "purpose")  
  - Subheadline: "Get faith-filled insights, practical tools, and encouragement delivered straight to your inbox."  
  - Button: "YES, SEND IT TO ME!" (uppercase, with arrow)  
- **Closing Section**:  
  - Quote: "God is not finished with your story. There is still **purpose** to discover, healing to experience, and work worth building." (italicized "purpose")  


### **4. Font Styles (Bold, Sizes, Hierarchy)**
- **Logo ("JC")**:  
  - Font: Bold, modern sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold** or **Poppins Bold**)  
  - Size: ~2.5rem (larger than brand name)  
  - Color: White  
- **Brand Name ("JUST CHURCHY")**:  
  - Font: Uppercase, clean sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1.2rem (smaller than logo)  
  - Color: White  
- **Hero Tagline ("Faith. Wellness. Purpose. Freedom.")**:  
  - Font: Bold, sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**)  
  - Size: ~2.8rem (largest text on page)  
  - Color: White  
- **Hero Subheadline**:  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1.2rem (smaller than tagline)  
  - Color: White (with orange accent on "on purpose")  
- **Service Card Titles** (e.g., "Build Your Team Advantage"):  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**)  
  - Size: ~1.5rem (larger than card descriptions)  
  - Color: White  
- **Service Card Descriptions**:  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1rem (smaller than titles)  
  - Color: White  
- **Social Media Email**:  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1rem  
  - Color: White  
- **Opt-in Form Headline**:  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**)  
  - Size: ~1.8rem  
  - Color: White (with orange accent on "purpose")  
- **Opt-in Form Subheadline**:  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1rem  
  - Color: White  
- **Opt-in Button Text**:  
  - Font: Bold sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Bold**)  
  - Size: ~1rem  
  - Color: White  
- **Closing Quote**:  
  - Font: Regular sans-serif (e.g., **Montserrat Regular**)  
  - Size: ~1rem  
  - Color: White (with orange accent on "purpose")  


### **5. Image/Photo Descriptions**
- **Profile Photo**:  
  - Circular frame (gold/orange border, ~150px diameter)  
  - Content: A smiling person with short curly hair, wearing a dark sweatshirt with text ("CAJ YMMX!")  
  - Background: Blurred outdoor scene (plants/trees)  
  - Position: Centered below the logo, above the hero tagline  


### **6. Button Styles and Labels**
- **Service Card Buttons**:  
  - Style: Circular orange button (solid fill) with a white right arrow icon  
  - Size: ~40px diameter  
  - Position: Right-aligned within each card  
- **Opt-in Form Button**:  
  - Style: Rectangular orange button (solid fill) with white text and a right arrow icon  
  - Size: ~180px width × 45px height  
  - Position: Below the email input field, right-aligned  


### **7. Social Media Icons**
- **Icons**: 5 circular icons (white outline on black background) with orange fill on hover  
- **Platforms**: Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, TikTok, Email (envelope)  
- **Size**: ~40px diameter  
- **Spacing**: Evenly spaced (20px between each)  
- **Position**: Centered below the service cards, above the opt-in form  


### **8. Spacing and Section Divisions**
- **Overall Spacing**: Generous vertical padding (e.g., 60px between sections) to avoid clutter  
- **Section Dividers**: Thin orange lines (10px long) centered above/below key sections (e.g., hero tagline, opt-in form, closing quote)  
- **Card Spacing**: 20px gap between each service card  
- **Opt-in Form Padding**: 30px internal padding (around the email input and button)  


### **9. Card Designs**
- **Style**: Rectangular cards with a thin orange border (1px)  
- **Background**: Black (matches page background)  
- **Layout**:  
  - Left: Icon (circular, orange fill, white outline)  
  - Middle: Title + Description (text aligned left)  
  - Right: Orange button (circular)  
- **Icon Details**:  
  - Card 1 (Team): Group of people icon (orange)  
  - Card 2 (Productivity): Gear icon (orange)  
  - Card 3 (Consultation): Chat bubbles icon (orange)  


### **10. Opt-in Form**
- **Container**: Rectangular with thin orange border (1px)  
- **Layout**:  
  - Left: Envelope icon (orange, circular)  
  - Middle: Headline + Subheadline (text aligned left)  
  - Right: Email input + Button  
- **Email Input**:  
  - Style: White background, rounded corners (5px), placeholder text "Your email address" (gray)  
  - Size: ~250px width × 45px height  
- **Button**: See Section 6 (orange, with arrow)  


### **11. Profile Section Details**
- **Photo**: Circular frame (gold/orange border, ~150px diameter)  
- **Position**: Centered below the logo, above the hero tagline  
- **Border**: Thin gold/orange line (matches brand accent)  


### **12. Mobile vs Desktop Layout Hints**
- **Desktop**:  
  - Single column, centered (max width ~800px)  
  - All elements aligned center (logo, photo, cards, form)  
- **Mobile**:  
  - Same structure, but:  
    - Reduce padding (e.g., 30px between sections)  
    - Stack service cards vertically (no horizontal layout)  
    - Make buttons full-width (for easier tapping)  
    - Shrink font sizes slightly (e.g., hero tagline ~2rem)  
    - Ensure social icons are touch-friendly (larger than desktop)  


### **Final Notes for Recreation**
- Use a **black background** as the base (no gradients or patterns)  
- Maintain **high contrast** (white text on black, orange accents)  
- Keep icons **simple and bold** (no detailed illustrations)  
- Ensure **responsive design** (test on mobile to avoid overlapping elements)  

This breakdown captures every visual and textual detail to replicate the page exactly. Use a tool like Figma or Adobe XD to match the spacing and proportions!
